attributes.action: Give us a binding referendum to pick parliamentary democracy or direct democracy
attributes.additional_details: The beauty of Direct Democracy is that government must ask for our consent by referendum for all their policies. By law, they must implement R decisions within 2 years or call a general election. Further, if a citizen has a issue and gets enough voters's signatures, then the issue is forced into a R where their fellow citizens decide. Government are outside the loop. So the people are sovereign! They rule! We believe that direct democracy is more humane, effective, efficient than what we have.
attributes.background: New written Bill of Rights(BoR) says: Government must obey all referendums (Rs) in 2 years or call general election.Any citizen can force their issue into a R if they can get enough voters' signatures.No issue is immune to change by R.At least 3 Rs must be held each year.BoR can only be changed by R

rejection.details:
We are left in some confusion about what you are actually calling for. We sense that there may be a petition already open that you might be interested in signing:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766868
